# Financial Platform Lab Overlay

Use these sources as the project rules of truth when they are present in the repository context:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `.specs/codebase/INDEX.md`
- `.specs/codebase/TESTING.md`
- `.specs/codebase/CONVENTIONS.md`

Do not restate project rules from this overlay. Resolve conflicts by priority:

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `.specs/codebase/*`
3. PR title/body and changed files

If a listed context file is missing or truncated, do not invent project-specific requirements from this overlay alone.
